abilities.name: I'm Da Boss
abilities.declare: Pick a friendly **Moonclan Stabbas** unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.
abilities.effect:
Pick 1:

***Beckon the Loonatic Hordes:*** If the target unit is not in combat, you can return D6 slain models to it.

***Stab ’Em Good!:*** Add 1 to hit rolls for attacks made by the target unit until the start of your next turn.

abilities.name: Netters
abilities.declare: Pick an enemy **INFANTRY** unit in combat with this unit to be the target.
abilities.effect: Roll a dice. On a 2+, subtract 1 from hit rolls for attacks made by the target unit this phase.

abilities.name: Boing! Boing! Boing!
abilities.declare: Pick an enemy unit that any models in this unit passed across this phase to be the target, then roll a dice for each model in this unit that did so.
abilities.effect: For each 4+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.

enhancements.name: Flankin' Force
enhancements.effect: Pick up to 2 friendly units. Remove them from the battlefield and set them up again anywhere on the battlefield more than 6" from all enemy units.

enhancements.name: Frazzleboom
enhancements.effect: Each time a friendly **WAR MACHINE** is destroyed, before removing it from play, pick an enemy unit within 3" of that **WAR MACHINE** and roll a D3. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on that unit equal to the roll.

enhancements.name: The Hand of Gork
enhancements.phaseDetails: Once Per Battle, (Army) Your Movement Phase
enhancements.declare: Pick a friendly unit that is not in combat to use this ability.
enhancements.effect: Remove that unit from the battlefield and set it up again more than 9" from all enemy units.

enhancements.name: The Lunatic Hordes
enhancements.declare: Pick a friendly **Moonclan Stabbas** unit to use this ability.
enhancements.effect: You can return up to D3 slain models to that unit.

enhancements.name: Nightshade Mushroom
enhancements.phaseDetails: Once Per Battle, Enemy Movement Phase
enhancements.declare: Pick a friendly unit within your general’s combat range.
enhancements.effect: That unit cannot be targeted by shooting attacks in the next shooting phase.

enhancements.name: The Clammy Cowl
enhancements.effect: Subtract 1 from hit rolls for attacks that target your general.

enhancements.name: Hallucinogenic Fungus Brew
enhancements.effect: Your general has **WARD (4+)** in the first battle round, **WARD (5+)** in the second battle round, and **WARD (6+)** in the third and fourth battle rounds.

enhancements.name: Fight Another Day
enhancements.declare: Pick your general to use this ability if they used a **FIGHT** ability this turn.
enhancements.effect: Your general can make a 2D6" move but cannot end that move in combat.

enhancements.name: Glare of Frazzlegit
enhancements.phaseDetails: Once Per Battle, Any Combat Phase
enhancements.declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with your general to be the target.
enhancements.effect: Subtract 1 from hit rolls for attacks made by the target for the rest of the turn.

enhancements.name: Sunsteala Shard
enhancements.phaseDetails: Once Per Battle, Enemy Movement Phase
enhancements.effect: For the rest of the turn, friendly units cannot be targeted by shooting attacks while they are wholly within 6" of this unit, unless the attacking unit is in combat with the target unit.

enhancements.name: Devious Backstabba
enhancements.declare: Pick an enemy **HERO** in combat with this unit to be the target.
enhancements.effect: Roll a D3. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.

enhancements.name: Kunnin' As A Snarlfang
enhancements.phaseDetails: Once Per Battle, Any Combat Phase
enhancements.effect: For the rest of the turn, add 1 to the Rend characteristic of melee weapons used by friendly units while they are wholly within 12" of the bearer.

battleTraits.name: Fast As Frazzlegit
battleTraits.effect: Friendly units can use **CHARGE** abilities even if they used a **RETREAT** ability in the same turn. In addition, no mortal damage is inflicted on friendly units by **RETREAT** abilities.

battleTraits.name: Squigalanche
battleTraits.effect: Set up this unit wholly within your territory, wholly within 3" of a battlefield edge and more than 6" from all enemy units.

battleTraits.name: Under the Light of the Bad Moon
battleTraits.phaseDetails: Once Per Battle, Start of the First Battle Round
battleTraits.declare:
Pick a territory (either friendly territory or enemy territory) to be **under the Light of the Bad Moon**. If both players can use this ability, the players roll off and the winner picks a territory to be under the Light of the Bad Moon.

The territory picked remains under the Light of the Bad Moon in the first and second battle rounds. In the third and fourth battle rounds, the other territory is under the Light of the Bad Moon.
battleTraits.effect:
While a friendly unit is wholly within the territory that is **under the Light of the Bad Moon**, the appropriate effect below applies to it:

***Frothing Zealots:*** If the unit is a **Moonclan Stabbas** unit, add 3 to its control score.

***Lunar Squigs:*** If the unit is a **Squig Hoppers** unit, no mortal damage is inflicted on it when it uses **Retreat** abilities.

***Moonlit Hide:*** If the unit is a **Rockgut Troggoths** unit, add 1 to save rolls for it.
